According to the YKS Placement Results, Our University Ranked Among the Top 10 Universities in 6 of the 10 Undergraduate Programs

27.08.2025

According to the 2025 YKS placement results, Ibn Haldun University filled all its undergraduate quotas at 100%. In addition, 6 of our 10 undergraduate programs ranked among the top 10 universities, while the minimum success rankings for 9 of our programs also increased.

Ibn Haldun University achieved great success according to the YKS-2025 placement results. As one of the 6 foundation universities that fulfilled all quotas, the increase in success rankings in 9 of our 10 undergraduate programs compared to 2024 once again demonstrated our university's academic desirability and rising momentum.

Furthermore, according to the placement results, our university achieved great success by ranking in the top 10 among all universities in 6 out of 10 undergraduate programs.

We congratulate all new students who enrolled at our university based on the 2025 YKS placement results, which reinforce Ibn Haldun University's appeal in all areas of social sciences.
